overview.description: Demonstration of negative test for Dynamo DB
overview.name: Negative DynamoDB Test

migrate.comment: Check ability to migrate dataset with undefined values
migrate.name: DYNAMO

dynamo.comment: Check disability to SELECT undefined value
dynamo.query: SELECT active FROM dynamodb_news WHERE id = '4'

dynamo.comment: Check disability to SELECT undefined value
dynamo.query: SELECT createdAt FROM dynamodb_news WHERE id = '5'

dynamo.comment: Check disability to SELECT undefined value
dynamo.query: SELECT number FROM dynamodb_news WHERE id = '3'

dynamo.comment: Check disability to SELECT undefined value
dynamo.query: SELECT name FROM dynamodb_news WHERE id = '2'

dynamo.comment: Check disability to SELECT record with not existing id
Check disability to SELECT record using invalid datatype for WHERE clause
dynamo.query: SELECT * FROM dynamodb_news WHERE name = News1

http.comment: Check ability to get list of news

dynamo.comment: Check ability to INSERT values with additional columns
dynamo.query: INSERT INTO dynamodb_news VALUE { 'name': 'News6', 'number': 6, 'active': true, 'createdAt': '2023-04-17T12:34:20.367', 'id': '6', 'topic' : 'sport', 'author' : 'John Doe' }

http.comment: Check disability to get additional columns by news id
Check disability to get additional columns by news name
